## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss collaboration between Austin Arensberg (Okta Ventures) and Marcel Santilli (Growth X.AI) for an upcoming AI-focused workshop with Okta's portfolio companies.](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel to present on "Building an AI-led Growth Engine" for Okta's portfolio companies on Dec 12th, 11 AM PST](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Workshop format: 15-20 min presentation, followed by Q\&A and open discussion among attendees](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Potential for future breakfast event collaboration in January, focusing on AI in go-to-market strategies](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Marcel's approach centers on providing high-value content to build trust and generate business opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and Current Venture

  - [Previously CMO at Deepgram, which grew to $13B valuation](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Left Deepgram in September, started Growth X.AI](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Nearly at $3M ARR within a few months](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Working with companies like Credit Karma and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Conducts AI workflow workshops, with 170+ companies participating in 4 cohorts](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)

### Workshop Structure and Content

  - [1-hour session, likely well-attended (20-25 people expected)](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Marcel to present for 15-20 minutes on AI-led growth](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Will include demos of AI tools (e.g., automated follow-ups from call transcripts)](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Austin to facilitate Q\&A and encourage participation from attendees](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Not recorded, follows Chatham House rules for open discussion](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)

### Okta's Portfolio Companies

  - [Mix of companies from $500K to $50-80M in revenue](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Likely combination of early-stage startups and more established firms](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Expected high interest in AI applications for growth](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)

### Future Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Potential for a breakfast event in January](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Focus on go-to-market strategies and AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Preference for Thursday or Friday mornings](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Aim for in-depth work discussions rather than networking](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)

### Marcel's Business Approach

  - [Emphasis on providing value and building trust through sharing IP](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Success stories include clients like Bob from Good Call (10x traffic growth, 3x ARR)](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Open to various collaborations that align with giving value first](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send Austin a blurb about himself and the company for promotional materials](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Austin to send workshop template and logistics details to Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Schedule January breakfast event (Thursday or Friday morning)](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Marcel's team can assist with event logistics if needed](https://fathom.video/share/5k4WpJxSY8aLzbWqnmpvSXGkQ_ET9sf9?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
